titleStmt.title: SII 27.81: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 81. (A.R. No. 227 of 1931-32.) PEDDAVELAGAṬŪRU, PUNGANUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the courtyard of Varadarājasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1327 (expressed in words), Tāraṇa, Jyēshṭha śu. 5, Wednesday corresponding to 1404 A.D., May 14. The Śaka year was current.

It records the installation of god Varadarājadēva (in the temple) at Hiriya-Veḷagāṭūru situated in Huli-nāḍu of Muḷuvāya-rājya and of gift of land as sarvamānya for worship and offerings to the same by Lakhaya-nāyaka, son of Mupeya-nāyaka who was the bāgila-pradhāni (chief secretary ?) of Bommaṇa-voḍeya son of Bā[da]rāya-Voḍeya. The latter was the mahāpradhāna of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kaliyugada śākha sāvi
rada muṁnūṟa yippattēḷaneya tāraṇa saṁva
tsarada jēṣṭa su 5 bu puṣya nakṣatradalu rājādhirāja rāja pa
ramēsvara bhāṣege tapuvarāyaragaṁḍa harihararāyara ma
hāpradhāna mururāyaragaṁḍa bhāsege tapuvarāyaragaṁḍa bāda
rāyavoḍeyara kumāra boṁmaṇa voḍeyara bāgilapradhāni Elakō
la siṁha kulavardanarāgida mupeyanāyakana kumāra lakha
yanāyakanu muḷuvāyarājyada baḍa hulināḍa hiriyaveḷa
gaṭūralu śrīvaradarājadēvara śrīpratiṣṭeyanu māḍi Aṁgabhō
ga nayivēdya dīpava naḍasuvadake dēvarige muḍuvāya nalapana kuṁ
ṭeya keḷage Uḷaṁtā gadeU hatukoḷage hiri nanuyuramu
ṁdaṇa ṭhāṇeyu yiṣṭanu yiyūra Anēsa gauṁḍuga
ḷu voḷagāda samasta prajagaḷu lakhayanāyakaru samudaya
vāgibiṭṭa sarvvamāṁnyavanu caṁdra Ādityaruḷaṁtaṁbaraṁ
naḍasibaharu naḍasidaṁtāvaru gaṁgeya taḍiyalu saha
sra kavileya dānavamāḍida phalavanu Anubhavisaḷuvaru naḍasa
deyidavanu śrīgaṁge gōdāvariya taḍiyalu sahasrakavile
ya koṁda pāpadalu hōdaru Avage nāyaka naraka tappa
du naṁbiyā veṭṭa
ra sēna bōva
Digital edition of SII 27.81 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
